text: arXiv 2606.19322v1. Equation Λ↪Γ. Matched concepts: Variable, Embedding. Variable means a Variable is a mathematical concept used as a named object, value, or quantity in formal mathematical discourse. Embedding means embedding is a map that represents one mathematical object faithfully inside another structure.
